prompt:
Modern minimalist 1:1 hyper-realistic lifestyle photograph. NO PEOPLE, NO hands. Clean scandi-modern aesthetic with generous whitespace.

SCENE: a clean modern living-room coffee table, soft light-oak wood surface, minimalist style. The Dialed Sea Moss Gummies jar (matching the provided reference image — black plastic, teal/cyan + gold/yellow accents, GOLD LID, front label fully legible) sits OFF-CENTER in the right third of the frame. Just two intentional props nearby: a single hardcover book lying closed and flat on the table (neutral linen cover, no visible title), and a single clean ceramic mug with steam. NOTHING ELSE — no clutter.

LIGHTING: bright clean natural daylight from a tall window in the soft-focus background, washing the scene cleanly. Soft neutral shadow behind the jar. Specular highlight on the jar's curved glossy black plastic.

FRAMING: clean modern editorial composition — the jar off-center with intentional negative space, balanced minimalist arrangement. Slight 3/4 angle from a comfortable seated eye-level.

BACKGROUND: out-of-focus minimalist modern living room — a corner of a creamy linen sofa in soft-focus, soft white wall, the tall window behind. Shallow depth-of-field. Bright airy real-photograph feel.

STYLE: hyper-realistic photography, 50mm look, f/2.8 shallow depth, simple modern clean composition. NO AI artifacts, NO text overlays, NO graphic elements, NO callouts.
